metadata.description: Raven — local discipline layer for AI coding: deterministic skill routing, commit-time secret/CVE guards, cost-aware model routing, audit logs. MIT, runs entirely on your machine.

plugins.name: raven
plugins.description: Discipline layer for AI coding. Andie plans architecture with a 3-angle review; Andie-Jr triages brownfield bugs in 2 rounds; deterministic routers pick the right one per prompt; local hooks block secrets and high-CVSS libraries at commit and gate edits until a specialist skill has run. 61 skills, zero telemetry, everything local.
